---
title: "Baseline pupil size is related to fluid intelligence: A reply to Unsworth et al. (2021)"

pub-authors:
  - Tsukahara
  - Draheim
  - Engle

pub-year: "2021"
date: "2021-10-01"
venue: "Cognition"
pub-type: "Empirical Article"
pub-status: "Published"

projects:
  - brain

categories:
  - locus-coeruleus

pdf: "/publications/2021/cog-pupil-luminance-reply/Tsukahara_et_al_2021_Cognition.pdf"
data: ""
code: ""
doi: "10.1016/j.cognition.2021.104826"
link: ""

listing-page: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>.quarto-title-meta { display: none !important; } .quarto-title-block .abstract { display: none !important; }</style>
---

{{< include ../../../assets/_meta-publication.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../assets/_download-buttons.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../assets/_pdf-viewer.qmd >}}
